hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env(\.|$)' && { echo 'Blocked: .env edits require manual review' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *.py) (cd "$(dirname $f)" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null) ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) (cd "$(dirname $f)" && npx --no-install biome check --write "$f" 2>/dev/null) ;; esac; exit 0
